reviews.author: Sophie M.
reviews.text: Incredible quality. I crossed Iceland for 3 weeks with my Wildora — no problems despite the storms. The comfort is truly hotel-level.

reviews.author: Thomas B.
reviews.text: I was hesitating between several brands. Wildora wins on all points: finish, ease of setup, comfort. Best purchase of the year.

reviews.author: Camille R.
reviews.text: 3 months road-tripping in a van, 8 countries crossed. The Wildora tent handled everything. The 60-second opening is really true!

reviews.author: Antoine L.
reviews.text: Premium design, ultra-simple assembly, exceptional comfort. Customer service is also top-notch — they called me back the same evening.

whyWildora.headline: Born on the road,
whyWildora.paragraph1: Wildora was born from frustration. After years of using mediocre outdoor gear on roads across Europe and Africa, our founders decided to create what didn't exist: truly premium vanlife equipment, accessible to all.
whyWildora.paragraph2: Every Wildora product is designed with an obsession for detail — from materials to finish, from ease of setup to night comfort. Because you deserve the best, wherever you are.

urgency.headline: Limited Stock — High Demand
urgency.text: Our rooftop tents go fast. Only a few units left. Order now to receive your delivery before the weekend.

finalCta.headline: Equip your next bivouac.
finalCta.subheadline: Rooftop tents made for long tracks, desert nights and clean overland setups.

hero.label: Our Story
hero.headline: Born for adventure.
hero.subheadline: Wildora is more than a brand. It's a mindset — the mindset of those who choose the road over the comfort of the ordinary.

story.label: The Origins
story.headline: It all started on a deserted road in Mongolia
story.paragraph1: It was summer 2019. Lucas and Emma, two French engineers passionate about travel, were crossing Mongolia in a converted van. After three weeks battling a cheap rooftop tent — broken zip, leaking tarp, laborious setup — they made a decision: either find the perfect tent, or create it themselves.
story.paragraph2: Two years of R&D later, after testing dozens of prototypes in the worst conditions — Saharan storms, nights at -20°C in the Alps, sweltering Middle Eastern heat — Wildora was born. A product that makes no compromises.
story.paragraph3: Today, over 2,000 adventurers across 42 countries trust Wildora for their expeditions. And we're just getting started.

items.title: Boundless freedom
items.description: We believe that true freedom is being able to go wherever you want, whenever you want, without constraint.

items.title: Absolute quality
items.description: We refuse compromises. Every material, every stitch, every mechanism is chosen to last for years.

items.title: Accessible adventure
items.description: Premium outdoor gear shouldn't be reserved for an elite. Wildora makes excellence accessible to all adventurers.

items.title: Minimal impact
items.description: We design our products to last. Less waste, more adventures. Nature welcomes us — let's protect it.

items.question: How long does tent installation take?
items.answer: Full installation takes less than 60 seconds. Our patented aluminum articulated arm system opens with one hand. No poles, no ropes, no stress.

items.question: Which vehicles is the tent compatible with?
items.answer: All our tents are compatible with standard roof bars (minimum static load 75 kg/m²). Compatible with Toyota, Volkswagen, Ford, Jeep, Mercedes, Land Rover, and most SUVs/4x4s.

items.question: How does the tent handle rain?
items.answer: The outer canvas is 600D polycotton with grade 4 waterproof treatment (3,000mm resistance). Seams are heat-sealed for perfect waterproofing. Tested in extreme conditions.

items.question: What is the return policy?
items.answer: You have 30 days to return your product, no questions asked. Contact our customer service and we'll organize the return for free. Refund within 5 business days.

items.question: Is the tent compatible with car washes?
items.answer: Yes, with the tent closed. The total height (vehicle + closed tent) must be less than the height allowed in your car wash. Check the dimensions in the product sheet.

items.question: What after-sales service do you offer?
items.answer: 3-year parts and labor warranty. Our team is available 6 days/7 by chat, email and phone. Spare parts available for life for all our models.
